title: బర్తరఫ్ బర్తరఫ్ చేయాల్సిందే..
subject: BRS-led protests demand removal of Union Minister Bandi Sanjay and arrest of his son Sai Bhagirath
summary: BRS party members, leaders, and youth wings organized protests across Warangal district on May 11, demanding the removal of Union Minister Bandi Sanjay from his position and the immediate arrest of his son Sai Bhagirath, who is accused of sexually assaulting a minor. The protests were held at key locations including the Warangal Police Commissionerate gate, with BRS leaders like Vijayabhaskar criticizing the government for providing preferential treatment to the minister's family. The protests were accompanied by demands for the state government to ensure the safety of the victim's family and to take legal action against the accused. The protests also highlighted the perceived double standard in the justice system, questioning whether the minister's son would receive the same legal treatment as ordinary citizens.

title: ‘ఆర్‌ఎన్23’ చిత్రం ఆరంభం
subject: Rohit Narra's upcoming film 'RN23' begins production
summary: The film 'RN23', directed by Chinimilli Manikumar and produced by Karan S. Productions, officially began production with a launch event in Hyderabad. The film, described as a commercial family entertainer with romance and emotions, will start its first schedule on June 10 and aims for a release within the same year. Key cast includes Nayanthara as the lead actress, alongside actors like Nareish Vicky, Rohini, Sampath, and Ajay.

title: Nellore: హెల్మెట్ లేకపోతే ప్రాణాలకే ముప్పు.. స్కూల్ విద్యార్థులకు పోలీసుల క్లాస్!
subject: Nellore police conduct traffic awareness program for school students
summary: Nellore district SP Dr. Ajit Vezendla's directive resulted in a traffic awareness program at Akshara Vidyalaya school, where South Traffic Inspector K. Venkat Reddy educated 400 NCERT cadets on traffic rules, helmet safety, prohibited triple riding, legal driving age, and road safety responsibilities. The program aims to instill traffic awareness from school age to prevent accidents.

title: Priyanka Chopra, Jaideep Ahlawat and Jim Sarbh to star in Mira Nair’s next ‘Amri’
subject: Mira Nair's biographical film 'Amri' on artist Amrita Sher-Gil to star Priyanka Chopra, Jaideep Ahlawat, and Jim Sarbh
summary: Mira Nair has announced her upcoming biographical drama 'Amri,' centered on the life and art of Amrita Sher-Gil, a pioneering figure in modern Indian art. The film stars Anjali Sivaraman as Sher-Gil, with Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Jaideep Ahlawat, Jim Sarbh, Emily Watson, and others in supporting roles portraying her family and associates. Nair stated that Sher-Gil's art has profoundly influenced her filmmaking, calling her use of color and framing transformative. Set in early 20th-century India, Hungary, and France, the film explores Sher-Gil's cultural duality, artistic evolution, and defiance of social norms. Currently in production across India and Hungary, 'Amri' also sees Priyanka Chopra serving as executive producer. The project aims to highlight Sher-Gil's legacy as a bold, boundary-pushing artist whose work continues to resonate globally.

title: Tirupati: భక్తిశ్రద్ధలతో ఆంజనేయ హోమం
subject: Hindu religious ceremony celebrating Hanuman Jayanti at Tirupati temple
summary: The Sri Sridevi Bhudevi Sameta Sri Kalyana Venkateswara Temple in Varadayyapalem, Tirupati district, held Hanuman Jayanti celebrations with various rituals including Lakshmi Ganapati Homa, Navagraha Shanti Homa, Lakshmi Narayana Homa, and Anjaneya Homa. The event featured abhishekam with panchamrita and sacred water, flower offerings, and distribution of anna prasadam and food donations to devotees.

title: నేడు సీపీగెట్‌ నోటిఫికేషన్‌ విడుదల
subject: Telangana's Common Post-Graduate Entrance Test (CPGET)-2026 notification to be released on Wednesday evening
summary: The notification for the Common Post-Graduate Entrance Test (CPGET)-2026, which facilitates admissions into postgraduate courses across Telangana, is set to be released on Wednesday evening. Kakatiya University has been entrusted with the conduct of the examination this year, and Professor Rajender Katla has been appointed as the CPGET Convener to oversee the process. The release marks the beginning of the admission cycle for PG programs in the state.

title: కొనుగోళ్లు వేగవంతం చేయండి
subject: Farmers stage protest in Bonakal demanding faster procurement of paddy and maize
summary: Farmers affiliated with BRS staged a major protest on Tuesday at Professor Jayashankar Centre in Bonakal mandal headquarters, demanding accelerated procurement of paddy and maize. Led by former Khammam ZP chairperson Lingala Kamal Raju, they highlighted that only 2.30 lakh quintals have been procured against a production of 5.73 lakh quintals in the mandal. Farmers expressed concern over standing crops and stored grain being damaged due to untimely rains, accusing the Congress government of neglect. Protesters, including several BRS leaders, demanded immediate action to speed up purchases and transport gunny bags from storage sheds via trucks. One farmer, Cheepuri Venkatanarayana from Brahmanapalli, lay on the road in defiance of scorching heat. The party vowed to continue fighting until every grain produced is procured.

title: Hegseth faces bipartisan grilling about weapons drawdown during Iran war
subject: Bipartisan lawmakers question US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Iran war's impact on weapons stockpiles and strategy
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth testified before a bipartisan congressional panel on Tuesday, addressing concerns over the Iran war's strain on US military resources, including munitions stockpiles and a $29 billion war cost. Lawmakers from both parties challenged his assertions of sufficient military readiness, with Democrats criticizing the administration's lack of a defined endgame and Republicans questioning budget priorities. Hegseth defended the Pentagon's position, emphasizing efforts to ramp up production, while lawmakers highlighted political risks of the war amid rising fuel prices and mid-term elections. The hearing also reviewed the Trump administration's $1.5 trillion 2027 defense budget proposal.

title: పైపులైన్ తొలగింపునకు రూ.10 వేలు లంచం..ఏసీబీకి చిక్కిన కార్యదర్శి, సర్పంచ్ భర్త
subject: Gadham Rajugoud and Anjaneyulu arrested for taking ₹10,000 bribe to remove drainage pipeline
summary: In Komurawelli village, Gram Panchayat Secretary Gadham Rajugoud and Sarpanch's husband Anjaneyulu were apprehended by Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB) officials while accepting a ₹10,000 bribe to remove a drainage pipeline from a landowner's property. The landowner had previously reported the demand for the bribe, prompting ACB to conduct surveillance and make the arrest on Monday. Both individuals were subsequently presented before the ACB court.

title: OTT మూవీ రివ్యూ: కంటతడి పెట్టించే హార్ట్‌టచింగ్ స్టోరీ
subject: Telangana film 'Love Mocktail 3' streaming on ZEE5 Kannada
summary: The Telangana film 'Love Mocktail 3' has gained emotional resonance with audiences through its portrayal of a father-daughter relationship, following the protagonist's journey after his wife's death. The film, starring Darling Krishna, has been well-received in theaters and now streams on ZEE5 Kannada, where it continues to evoke strong emotional responses. The review highlights the film's emotional depth, natural performances, and balanced mix of drama and light comedy, with particular praise for the father-daughter bonding scenes that leave viewers moved to tears. The film's background music and cinematography further enhance the emotional impact of the story.

title: Bobbili: ప్రభుత్వ స్థలాల్లో ఇళ్ల నిర్మాణం.. అధికారులకు ఫిర్యాదు చేసినా నో రెస్పాన్స్!
subject: Government land encroachment in Bobbili ITI Colony
summary: Residents and community groups in Bobbili, Andhra Pradesh, have reported that unauthorized construction is taking place on government land in the ITI Colony area, specifically in the Golloballi revenue jurisdiction. The groups, including farmers' and student organizations, claim that despite filing complaints with the municipal commissioner and tahsildar, no action has been taken. They argue that government land meant for public institutions like a junior college is being illegally occupied, while officials fail to address the issue, raising concerns about corruption and mismanagement of public resources.

title: Nagole: హనుమాన్ జయంతి సంబరాలు పూజల్లో పాల్గొన్న ఎమ్మెల్యే సుధీర్ రెడ్డి
subject: Telangana MLA Sudhir Reddy attends Hanuman Jayanti celebrations at Ramayya Temple
summary: Telangana's Elbire Nagar MLA Devireddy Sudhir Reddy participated in the special Hanuman Jayanti puja ceremony held at Ramayya Temple in Nagole division. The event included prayers and darshan of Lord Hanuman, followed by the MLA extending Hanuman Jayanti wishes to the public, expressing hopes for everyone's health and happiness. Senior BRS leaders Ananthu Rajireddy and Chandrasekhar Azad also attended the event.

title: నేనే నాలుగు ఓవర్లు బౌలింగ్ చేశానా?.... నమ్మలేకపోతున్నా?:  డిసి బౌలర్
subject: Delhi Capitals secure victory over Punjab in IPL match
summary: Delhi Capitals secured a decisive victory over Punjab in the IPL, winning by three wickets. Madhav Tiwari played a pivotal role, taking two crucial wickets in his four overs while also scoring 18 runs off eight balls in the final overs. The match saw Punjab score 210 for five in 20 overs, while Delhi Capitals chased down the target with 216 for seven in 19 overs. Tiwari expressed gratitude to the management for giving him a chance and credited his bowling coach Munaf Patel for his improved performance. He also discussed his dual role as a bowler and batsman, emphasizing his commitment to the process and adaptability on the field.

title: CM Vijay: జ్యోతిష్యుడికి కీలక పోస్ట్.. సీఎం విజయ్ కీలక నిర్ణయం..
subject: CM Vijay appoints astrologer Radhan Pandit as special duty officer
summary: CM Vijay, after securing the Chief Minister position following a complex political maneuver, appointed his personal astrologer Radhan Pandit as 'Officer on Special Duty' for political affairs. This decision follows Pandit's advice to reschedule Vijay's swearing-in ceremony from 3:45 PM to 10 AM on May 10, based on astrological considerations. Pandit, who has served as a key advisor to Vijay for years and previously advised former Chief Minister Jayalalithaa, has a long history of influencing political decisions in Tamil Nadu. The appointment highlights the significant role of astrology in Tamil Nadu politics, with Pandit being a well-known figure who has advised multiple political leaders over four decades.

title: Pakistan | పాకిస్తాన్‌లో ఆత్మాహుతి దాడి.. 8 మంది మృతి.. 35 మందికి గాయాలు.. ఎమర్జెన్సీ అలర్ట్
subject: Suicide bombing in Lakki Marwat, Pakistan
summary: A suicide bombing in Lakki Marwat, Pakistan, resulted in 8 fatalities and over 35 injuries, including two traffic police officers and a female official. The attack took place on a Tuesday in the North-West Frontier region of Pakistan, near Naurang Bazaar in Fattak Chowk. The bomber, riding an auto-rickshaw, detonated the vehicle, causing widespread casualties. Authorities have declared a medical emergency, mobilizing medical staff and relocating critically injured patients to better-equipped hospitals. The incident follows a similar attack two days prior at a checkpoint, where approximately 15 police officers were killed.

title: Savitri Screen Presence: సావిత్రి నటప్రస్థానంలో అదృశ్యశక్తి... ఆమె లేకుంటే
subject: Savitri's cinematic continuity maintained by personal assistant Dakshayani
summary: The article explores how Dakshayani, Savitri's personal assistant, played a crucial yet invisible role in maintaining the actress's cinematic continuity across films. Through detailed record-keeping of costumes, jewelry, and scene sequences, and using a secret code ('akkā... chirugu undi') during shoots, Dakshayani ensured Savitri's on-screen image remained flawless. The piece highlights how such behind-the-scenes support, often overlooked, was essential for a star's professional consistency in Indian cinema, contrasting with modern practices where such details are managed by larger teams.

title: RJ Balaji: ‘వీర భద్రుడు’ రిలీజ్‌కు ముందు కొత్త వివాదం.. ఆర్‌జే బాలాజీపై ఫ్యాన్స్ ఫైర్!
subject: RJ Balaji's controversial remarks about Telugu cinema spark fan backlash ahead of film release
summary: RJ Balaji, director of 'Veera Bhadrudu', is facing significant backlash from Telugu cinema fans after old interview clips resurfacing online. In the clips, he criticized Telugu films for lacking logic and focusing solely on hero worship, which contradicts his current efforts to garner support for his film. The controversy has intensified ahead of the film's May 14 release, with fans questioning his credibility and accusing him of undermining Telugu cinema before asking for its patronage. Industry analysts warn this could negatively impact the film's opening collections despite the star power of Surya and Trisha.

title: 25 చెట్లతో సమానం..‘ఆల్గే ట్రీ’
subject: Bhopal installs India's first carbon-capturing 'Algae Tree' under Smart City project
summary: Bhopal, under its Smart City initiative, has deployed India's first carbon-capturing 'Algae Tree' in Swami Vivekananda Park. The device, developed over two years by 50+ researchers, engineers, and scientists from Mushroom World Group, captures CO2 equivalent to 25 full-grown trees and releases oxygen at the same rate. Powered by solar energy without harming the environment, the device uses algae (called 'Algae' in local language) to form a tree-like structure. The installation has gone viral online, generating public interest and positive responses from netizens.

title: Rahul Dravid: ఫ్రాంచైజీ యజమానిగా ద్రవిడ్.. కెప్టెన్ అశ్విన్, లీగ్ ఓనర్ స్టార్ హీరో!
subject: Rahul Dravid becomes franchise owner in European T20 Premier League with Dublin-based team
summary: Rahul Dravid, the legendary Indian cricketer known as 'The Wall', has entered the ownership group of the Dublin franchise in the European T20 Premier League (ETPL), a new league launching in 2026. The league, co-owned by Bollywood actor Abhishek Bachchan, aims to expand cricket across Europe by providing opportunities for young and local players. Dravid, drawn by the long-term vision of growing the sport, will contribute to developing cricket in Dublin, which already has a strong cricketing community. Former Indian spinner Ravichandran Ashwin will serve as captain and mentor for the Dublin team, named 'Dublin Guardians'. The ETPL, jointly organized by Cricket Ireland, Cricket Scotland, and the Royal Dutch Cricket Association, will feature six franchises based in Dublin, Belfast, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Rotterdam, and Amsterdam. A total of 33 matches are scheduled for ETPL 2026, to be held from August 26 to September 20. Abhishek Bachchan emphasized that bringing in icons like Dravid, Steve Waugh, and Jonty Rhodes reflects the league's ambitious vision. The league's primary goal is to strengthen grassroots cricket and elevate the sport's profile in Europe.

title: Possessiveness disturbing: Court warns against alienating child from father
subject: Bombay High Court warns against parental alienation in child custody dispute
summary: The Bombay High Court has ruled that children require the love and presence of both parents, criticizing a mother for denying visitation rights to her estranged husband during summer vacation. The court granted the father temporary custody for five days, stating that the mother's possessiveness over the child was 'disturbing' and could harm the child's development. The court noted that the child, aged eight, had been referred to a psychologist, suggesting that parental alienation might be the cause. The ruling emphasizes that children should not be subjected to parental discord and must receive affection from both parents to develop healthily.

title: Two Sangareddy residents die as Karnataka bus hit bike on KA-TG border
subject: Two Sangareddy residents killed in motorcycle collision with Karnataka RTC bus on state border
summary: Two residents of Bandla Mirzapur in Sangareddy district, Narsimhulu (48) and his nephew Arun Kumar (22), were killed in a road accident on the Telangana-Karnataka border near Shamshalpur. The incident occurred on Tuesday when a Karnataka RTC bus, en route to Hyderabad, collided with their motorcycle as they were traveling to Bidar for a wedding. The bus subsequently plunged into a roadside gorge on the Bidar-Zaheerabad road, injuring 15 passengers, including the driver Srimanth and conductor Ravi. The victims died on the spot, while the injured were taken to government hospitals in Zaheerabad and Bidar for treatment.

title: వర్క్ ఫ్రమ్ హోమ్ వైపు మళ్ళీ అడుగులు.. ప్రధాని పిలుపుతో కంపెనీల కీలక నిర్ణయం!
subject: Indian government encourages remote work to reduce fuel consumption amid geopolitical tensions
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has urged citizens and businesses to minimize unnecessary travel and adopt remote work practices to safeguard national fuel security amid escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Major corporations including Tata Motors, Mercedes-Benz India, Deloitte, and KPMG are reviewing their work policies to prioritize hybrid and remote work models, reducing fuel consumption and supporting national interests. The move follows similar measures taken during the COVID-19 pandemic, with companies already implementing hybrid work models and planning to expand remote work options.

title: ప్రముఖ జ్యోతిష్యుడిని సీఎంవో ప్రత్యేక అధికారిగా నియమించుకున్న ముఖ్యమంత్రి..!
subject: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister appoints personal astrologer as special officer
summary: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Joseph Vijay has appointed his personal astrologer, R. R. Pandit Vetrivel, as Officer on Special Duty (OSD) in the Chief Minister's office, a move that has generated significant political and social media discussion. The appointment follows the astrologer's accurate prediction of Vijay's electoral victory in the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, which ended a decades-long DMK-AIADMK dominance. Vetrivel has served as Vijay's personal astrologer for the past eight years, advising on both internal and external matters. The decision to appoint him to a government position has sparked debate about the influence of astrology in governance.

title: Vinesh Phogat: రెజ్లింగ్‌లో మళ్లీ రగడ.. నన్ను ఆసియా క్రీడలకు దూరం చేయాలని కుట్రలు చేస్తున్నారు..
subject: Vinesh Phogat alleges WFI conspiracy to exclude her from Asia Games
summary: Vinesh Phogat, Indian wrestler, has accused the Wrestling Federation of India (WFI) of orchestrating a conspiracy to prevent her participation in the upcoming Asia Games. She claims she was barred from the national open ranking tournament in Gorakhpur without justification, leading to her being declared ineligible. Phogat stated that WFI officials are targeting her due to fear of her winning medals, and she has been subjected to mental harassment. She also mentioned that her son inspired her to continue competing despite these challenges. The WFI claims they followed proper procedures, including the required six-month notice period for retirement, but Phogat argues she was denied the opportunity to explain her case within the 14-day window.

title: Rashmi Gautam: నేను బీజేపీకి, మోడీకి సపోర్ట్ చేస్తా.. హాట్‌ టాపిక్‌గా యాంకర్ రష్మీ పోస్ట్ .. ఏం జరిగిందంటే?
subject: Rashmi Gautam's social media post expressing support for BJP and Modi
summary: Rashmi Gautam, a well-known Telugu television anchor, has made a social media post expressing her support for the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) and Prime Minister Narendra Modi, while clarifying that she does not support or engage with individuals who commit crimes such as rape or sexual harassment. She emphasized her focus on advocating for the voiceless, particularly animals, and urged people to direct their energy towards the government and judiciary for justice rather than targeting celebrities on social media. Her post has gone viral, sparking varied reactions from netizens.

title: RJ Balaji: చరణ్‌తో సినిమా చేయాలని ఉంది..  దర్శకుడు ఆర్ జె బాలాజీ ఆసక్తికర వ్యాఖ్యలు !
subject: RJ Balaji expresses admiration for Ram Charan and interest in collaborating on a film
summary: RJ Balaji, known for directing 'Veera Bhadra', expressed his personal admiration for Telugu superstar Ram Charan during a pre-release event for his upcoming film in Hyderabad. He mentioned being a dedicated fan who follows all of Charan's movies and is eagerly anticipating Charan's upcoming film 'Peddi' directed by Buchi Babu Sana. The director's comments have generated significant buzz among Mega fans on social media, with his statements trending widely.

title: మే 12న బంజారాహిల్స్ లో జాబ్ మేళా : కలెక్టర్ ప్రియాంక ఆల
subject: Hyderabad's Banjara Hills job fair scheduled for May 12
summary: The Collector of Hyderabad, Priyanka Al, announced a mega job fair to be held on May 12 at Babu Jagjivan Ram Bhavan in Banjara Hills, organized by the District Youth Sports Department and Industries Department. Over 10,000 registrations have been received, with 120 private companies participating across multiple sectors including finance, banking, marketing, and education. Eligible candidates include those with qualifications from 10th standard to post-graduation.

title: మీది ప్రధానిని అనే స్థాయా..?.. కర్నాటక కాంగ్రెస్ సర్కార్‌పై ప్రహ్లాద్ జోషి ఫైర్
subject: Karnataka Congress government criticized by Union Minister Pralhad Joshi over economic policies
summary: Union Minister Pralhad Joshi strongly criticized Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah for the Congress government's economic policies, accusing them of hiding failures and misinterpreting Prime Minister Modi's suggestions. Joshi highlighted Karnataka's rising debt, historical revenue shortfall, and increased prices of 48 items, while praising Modi's leadership in making India the world's fourth-largest economy.

title: The Paradise: బట్టకాల్చి మీదేస్తే ఊరుకోం..  రీషూట్ పుకార్లపై మేకర్స్ స్ట్రాంగ్ కౌంటర్!
subject: The Paradise film production team denies rumors of reshoots and confirms on-schedule shooting
summary: The film production team for 'The Paradise', starring Nani, has publicly denied social media rumors about reshoots, emphasizing that the film has been shot on schedule for over 100 days without any need for reshoots. They warned against spreading unverified information and stated they would take legal action against false claims, directing fans to official channels for updates.

title: మీటింగ్ తేదీ మార్పు కుదరదన్న కృష్ణాబోర్డు
subject: Krishna River Board rejects Telangana's request to reschedule tripartite committee meeting
summary: The Krishna River Board has declined Telangana's request to change the date of the tripartite committee meeting, which was initially scheduled for Monday at 11 AM but was rescheduled to Wednesday at 3:30 PM by the Board. Telangana had requested the meeting be held on April 14th, while Andhra Pradesh had proposed April 12th. The Board has chosen to follow Andhra Pradesh's proposed date, stating that the meeting will proceed as scheduled on Wednesday. The meeting concerns water allocation from Nagarjuna Sagar and Srisailam reservoirs, with Telangana seeking 13 TMC and 5 TMC respectively, while Andhra Pradesh requests 10 TMC total. Water resources department sources are criticizing Andhra Pradesh for what they call 'drama' over water allocation.

title: Amaravati: జైళ్ల సంస్కరణల దిశగా ఏపీ ప్రభుత్వం.. హోంమంత్రి కీలక ఆదేశాలు
subject: Andhra Pradesh government initiates jail reforms with focus on rehabilitation
summary: The Andhra Pradesh government, led by Home Minister Vangalapudi Anitha, has initiated comprehensive jail reforms aimed at transforming prisons from mere punishment centers to rehabilitation hubs. The review meeting highlighted the need to repurpose 25 non-functional jails, address overcrowding in major prisons like Rajamahendravaram and Visakhapatnam, implement technology for security (like NLJD devices), and establish specialized centers for mental health support and skill development. The reforms also include plans for parole monitoring, suicide prevention, and specialized courts for NDPS cases, reflecting a shift towards reducing recidivism and reintegrating inmates into society.

title: Kamareddy: కేంద్ర మంత్రి కుమారుడి అరెస్ట్ కోసం కాంగ్రెస్ పట్టు!
subject: Congress party protests for arrest of Union Minister's son in minor girl assault case
summary: Congress party members in Kamareddy district, Telangana, organized a protest at Moghul Nagar mandal's Boggugudi Chaurasta on May 13, 2026, demanding immediate arrest of Union Minister Bandi Sanjay's son Bandi Sai Bhagirath in connection with an alleged assault on a minor girl. The protest, led by Congress leaders including Raviender and P. Pandari, involved thousands of party workers and local leaders, emphasizing that 'the law should be equal for all' and calling for justice for the victim. The protest followed allegations against the minister's son, with Congress accusing the government of bias in handling the case.

title: Chicken prices surge due to summer, wedding season in Hyderabad
subject: Chicken prices rise in Hyderabad due to summer heat and wedding season demand
summary: Chicken prices in Hyderabad have surged from ₹300 to ₹350-370 per kg, driven by increased demand during the wedding season and reduced supply due to summer heat. Prices have risen across all categories, including live chicken (₹190-220/kg) and boneless (₹500/kg). The wedding season has boosted consumption, while high temperatures have affected poultry supply. Prices are expected to decline as monsoon approaches and temperatures drop.

title: Egg Masala: కండరాల పుష్టికి సూపర్ ఫుడ్‌.. హెల్తీ అండ్ టేస్టీ గ్రీన్‌ ఎగ్‌ మసాలా.. ఇలా చేసి తింటే
subject: Green Egg Masala recipe with health benefits
summary: This article presents a recipe for green egg masala, highlighting its nutritional benefits as a source of complete protein essential for muscle construction and cell repair. The recipe includes fresh ingredients such as coriander, mint, and yogurt, and provides step-by-step instructions for preparation. It emphasizes the importance of incorporating nutrient-rich foods into daily diets to combat health issues caused by poor dietary habits and processed foods.

title: 45 రోజుల్లోగా BSF కు ల్యాండ్ అప్పగిస్తం..అంతర్జాతీయ సరిహద్దు నిర్వహణకు అడ్డంకులు ఉండవు
subject: West Bengal government approves BSF land transfer for border fencing within 45 days
summary: The West Bengal government, led by Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee, has announced a key decision to transfer land to the Border Security Force (BSF) for the completion of border fencing along the India-Bangladesh border within 45 days. This follows delays under the previous government, which had slowed down fencing work for thousands of kilometers. The state shares a 4,097 km border with Bangladesh, with approximately 850 km still requiring fencing. The announcement was made during the first cabinet meeting held in Kolkata, where the Chief Minister also highlighted the government's commitment to implementing Ayushman Bharat, the new criminal code (BNSS), and the 2025 census. Additionally, the government pledged to support the families of 321 BJP workers who lost their lives in past political violence.

title: Hanuman Jayanti:  ఆంజనేయుడి జన్మరహస్యం... కలియుగంలో గట్టెక్కించే కపిధ్వజుడు
subject: Hanuman Jayanti and the spiritual significance of Hanuman's birth
summary: Hanuman Jayanti is celebrated on May 12, 2024, which coincides with a Tuesday, a day particularly sacred to Hanuman. The article delves into the spiritual significance of Hanuman's birth, explaining that he is considered the eleventh avatar of Shiva, born to Anjana Devi after a boon from Shiva. It also discusses the 'Suvarchala' form of Hanuman, representing a symbolic marriage for the purpose of gaining knowledge, not physical pleasure. The article emphasizes Hanuman's role as a protector against fear and adversity, with rituals like chanting Hanuman Chalisa on this day being highly recommended.

title: ఒక్కో మెడికల్ సీటుకు రూ.60 లక్షలు: దొరికిన బీహార్ సాల్వర్ గ్యాంగ్.. MBBS విద్యార్థే కింగ్ పిన్
subject: NEET exam paper leak and scam involving a gang in Bihar
summary: The National Testing Agency canceled the NEET exam due to a paper leak and a scam involving a gang in Bihar. The gang, led by a medical student, charged up to ₹60 lakh per medical seat. Seven individuals, including a medical student, were arrested. The gang had been selling seats by having someone else take the exam on behalf of the candidate. The NTA assured candidates that they would not need to re-register and would get their fees refunded. The scam is reminiscent of a similar incident in 2024.

title: జగద్గిరిగుట్ట పరిధిలోని వాటర్ హీటర్ స్విచ్చాఫ్ చేయకుండా..కుర్చీపై పెట్టిన మహిళ
subject: Electric water heater left on causes apartment fire in Jagadgirigutta
summary: In Jagadgirigutta, a woman using an electric water heater to heat water left it on a plastic chair without switching it off, leading to a fire that spread throughout the apartment. The fire caused a gas cylinder explosion, but all occupants escaped without injury. Firefighters controlled the blaze after being alerted.

title: హిమంత బిశ్వ శర్మ అనే నేను
subject: Himanta Biswa Sharma sworn in as Assam Chief Minister for second term
summary: Himanta Biswa Sharma has been sworn in as the Chief Minister of Assam for the second time, becoming the first non-Congress leader to assume office for a second term. The swearing-in ceremony took place at Khana Para Veterinary College ground in Guwahati, presided over by Governor Lakshman Prasad. Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Home Minister Amit Shah, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh, and other leaders attended the event. The BJP secured a landslide victory in the Assam Assembly elections, winning 82 out of 126 seats, with Sharma winning his constituency, Jorhat, by a margin of 89,000 votes.

title: మోదీ వైఫల్యంతోనే నీట్‌ పేపర్‌ లీక్‌
subject: Telangana BJP leader blames Modi government for NEET exam paper leak
summary: BRS Working President KTR has criticized the Modi government for the NEET exam paper leak, stating that the government's inability to conduct exams properly led to the leak. He demanded the resignation of Health Minister Rajeev, a thorough investigation, and an apology to students. The leak, which affected 23 lakh students, is the second such incident in two years, with the government failing to learn from the 2024 leak. KTR also criticized the BJP-ruled states of Rajasthan, Maharashtra, and Uttarakhand for the leaks, suggesting multiple states were involved in the scandal.

title: IPL Playoffs : రేసు నుంచి ముంబై, లక్నో అవుట్.. సీఎస్కే పరిస్థితి అగమ్యగోచరం.. మరి రాజస్థాన్ రాయల్స్‌ పరిస్థితి ?
subject: IPL 2026 playoffs race with CSK and Rajasthan Royals in precarious position
summary: The IPL 2026 league stage is nearing its climax with only two weeks remaining. RCB, SRH, and GT currently hold a strong position with 14 points each in 11 matches, giving them an 80% chance to qualify for playoffs. In contrast, CSK and RR are struggling with 12 points each, having a 42.7% and 41.8% chance respectively. Both teams need to win at least two of their remaining three matches to secure playoff spots, or rely on other teams' losses. Punjab Kings lost to Delhi Capitals, adding to the complexity of the race. Delhi Capitals and Kolkata Knight Riders have minimal chances at 1.2% and 11.6% respectively, while Mumbai Indians and Lucknow Super Giants have been eliminated from the race.

title: కోర్టుల ఆధునీకరణపై న్యాయ సలహా కమిటీ
subject: Supreme Court forms committee to modernize judiciary infrastructure nationwide
summary: Chief Justice of India, Justice Surya Kant, has constituted the 'Legal Advisory Committee on Infrastructure' to develop a comprehensive roadmap for modernizing India's judicial infrastructure. Headed by Justice Arvind Kumar, the committee will focus on improving working conditions in courts nationwide, strengthening facilities, addressing shortages, and recommending measures for computerization and reducing the digital divide. The committee is tasked with submitting an interim report by August 31 and will prioritize mobilizing government support and securing between ₹40,000 crore and ₹50,000 crore for court modernization across the country.

title: SC of India to hear ED plea against bail in coal scam case
subject: Supreme Court to hear ED's plea against anticipatory bail in coal scam case
summary: The Supreme Court of India has agreed to hear the Enforcement Directorate's plea challenging the grant of anticipatory bail to Anup Majee, director of a private coal firm, in a money laundering case linked to alleged illegal coal excavation and pilferage. The ED, represented by Additional Solicitor General S V Raju, argued that Majee was the 'kingpin' of a Rs 2,700 crore fraud involving national resource plunder. The bench questioned the ED on why Majee wasn't taken into custody earlier, and sought his response. The Delhi High Court had granted anticipatory bail in June 2023, which the ED is now challenging. The case involves misappropriation of coal worth Rs 2,742.32 crore from Eastern Coalfield Limited (ECL) leasehold area in a 2020 money laundering case. The matter is scheduled for hearing in September.

title: Vance or Rubio: Trump polls White House dinner attendees on 2028 race
subject: Trump's impromptu poll on 2028 Republican ticket featuring Vance and Rubio
summary: US President Donald Trump conducted an impromptu poll at a Rose Garden dinner for law enforcement leaders, asking attendees to choose between Vice President J.D. Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio for a potential 2028 presidential ticket. He described them as a 'dream team' but emphasized he had not officially endorsed either candidate, noting it was 'a perfect ticket' but 'minor details' that didn't constitute endorsement. Trump has been testing this pairing within his administration to gauge sentiment.

title: Lce Cream: అంబానీ ఐస్‌ క్రీమ్‌ వచ్చేసిందోచ్‌.. కొత్త వ్యాపారంలోకి.. వీడియో వైరల్‌..!
subject: Vantara brand expands into ice cream market with Mumbai launch
summary: Vantara, founded by Anant Ambani for wildlife conservation, has launched 'Vantara Creamery' in Mumbai at Jio World Drive, offering 17 Indian-flavored ice creams. The brand's AI-generated marketing video featuring a lion running alongside a creamery van has gone viral, blending conservation messaging with product launch. The initiative aims to expand Vantara's brand presence while promoting Indian culinary preferences.

title: ETPL Dublin Guardians: రాహుల్ ద్రవిడ్ యజమానిగా, రవిచంద్రన్ అశ్విన్ కెప్టెన్‌గా సరికొత్త టీం బరిలోకి.!
subject: ETPL Dublin Guardians team announced with Rahul Dravid as owner and Ravi Chandran Ashwin as captain
summary: Rahul Dravid, former Indian cricketer, has been announced as the owner of Dublin Guardians franchise for the European T20 Premier League (ETPL), with Ravichandran Ashwin as captain. The league, featuring six teams from Dublin, Belfast, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Rotterdam, and Amsterdam, aims to boost cricket in Europe. Dravid emphasized the league's goal to strengthen cricket in Europe and provide opportunities for young players. The inaugural season will run from August 26 to September 20, 2024.

title: మార్నింగ్ బ్రేక్ ఫాస్ట్.. ఇంట్లో రాగితో చేసుకునే ఆరోగ్యకరమైన టిఫిన్స్ ఇవే!
subject: Healthy finger millet-based breakfast recipes for home preparation
summary: The article highlights the benefits of using ragi (finger millet) for making nutritious breakfasts, offering simple recipes that can be prepared at home. It suggests replacing common ingredients like rice flour and minapappu (a type of flour) with ragi flour to create healthier meal options. The focus is on promoting ragi as a superior alternative for daily consumption, particularly for women who plan their morning meals.

title: Story Board : ప్రధాని మోడీ స్పీచ్ దారి తప్పిందా ? ఏదో చెప్పాలని..ఇంకేదో చెప్పారా ?
subject: Critique of Prime Minister Modi's political remarks during a development event in Telangana
summary: The article analyzes Prime Minister Narendra Modi's recent virtual visit to Telangana, where he inaugurated development projects but drew criticism for making political remarks. While the event was officially for launching infrastructure initiatives, Modi referenced West Bengal's election results and made comments seen as targeting opposition leaders like Revanth Reddy. Critics question the appropriateness of political messaging during development-focused events. The piece explores public and BJP worker confusion over the mixed messaging, and notes Telangana CM Revanth Reddy's on-stage appeal for equitable fund distribution, citing Gujarat's historical funding advantage. The central debate is whether such political commentary aligns with the purpose of official development ceremonies.

title: Watermelon: పుచ్చకాయ తిన్న గంటల్లోనే ఒకరు మృతి, నలుగురికి సీరియస్..
subject: Five children fall ill after eating watermelon at a wedding in Chhattisgarh, one dies
summary: A wedding celebration in Ghur Kot village, Chhattisgarh's Janjgir-Champa district, turned tragic when five children fell severely ill within hours of consuming watermelon and other food items. One 15-year-old, Akhilesh Dheewar, died, while four others were hospitalized with symptoms including vomiting, severe abdominal pain, and breathing difficulties. Local authorities launched an investigation, collected food samples for lab testing, and the district collector took suo motu cognizance. Officials report the four hospitalized children are in stable condition. The family suspects the watermelon, stored at home, caused the food poisoning.

title: గవర్నర్ తో సీఎం భేటీ..జూన్ 12న స్టూడెంట్స్ సభకు రావాలని విజ్ఞప్తి
subject: Telangana government plans student pledge against drugs on June 12
summary: The Telangana government has decided to hold a large public meeting on June 12, the first day of school reopening, where students will collectively pledge to stay away from drugs, alcohol, and tobacco. Chief Minister Revanth Reddy met with Governor Shiva Pratap Shukla at Lok Bhavan to discuss arrangements and the government's intention behind the initiative, which follows the Governor's earlier suggestion to prevent youth from drug addiction. The event aims to foster responsible citizenship among students.

title: NBK – Vivek Athreya : వివేక్ ఆత్రేయ సినిమాలో ‘బాలయ్య’ డ్యూయల్ రోల్.. ఊచకోత అన్ లిమిటెడ్
subject: Nandamuri Balakrishna to play dual role in Vivek Athreya's upcoming film
summary: Nandamuri Balakrishna, a prominent Telugu actor known for his action roles, is collaborating with director Vivek Athreya for a new project where he will portray two distinct characters. The film, currently in pre-production, is being developed with two script versions: one where Balakrishna plays both roles and another where he shares the screen with another star actor. The project, which may feature Mohanlal in a key role, is expected to have an official announcement by year-end. The film is tentatively titled 'Kurukshetra' and is being produced by Maitree Movies as a high-profile project.

title: POCSO charges against Bandi Sanjay’s son altered to aggravated sexual assault
subject: Police upgrade charges against Bandi Sanjay's son in POCSO case to aggravated penetrative sexual assault
summary: The Petbasheerabad Police have upgraded the charges in the POCSO case involving Union Minister Bandi Sanjay's son, Bandi Bageerath, from Section 11 (sexual harassment of a child) to Section 5(1) (Aggravated Penetrative Sexual Assault), a non-bailable offence carrying a minimum sentence of 20 years. The police summoned Bageerath for questioning on May 13, though he was not present at his residence when the notice arrived. His maternal uncle, Vamshi Krishna, received the notice and was instructed to bring him to the station. Bageerath had earlier approached the Telangana High Court's vacation bench seeking interim bail. Responding to the allegations, Bandi Sanjay stated that while his son denies wrongdoing and claims friendship with the minor, he would not interfere if guilt is proven, affirming equal application of the law.

title: TVK Floor Test: మద్రాస్ హైకోర్టు సంచలన తీర్పు.. బలపరీక్షకు ముందే టీవీకేకు కోలుకోలేని దెబ్బ!
subject: Madras High Court's landmark ruling halts TVK's floor test preparations
summary: The Madras High Court delivered a significant ruling that has disrupted the political plans of the TVK party ahead of a critical floor test. The court ordered that TVK MLA Srinivas Sethupathi, who narrowly lost the Tirupattur constituency election by a single vote, be barred from participating in the upcoming confidence vote. The court cited an electoral irregularity where votes from Tirupattur, a constituency in Tirupattur district, were mistakenly sent to the counting center in Tirupattur district, causing Sethupathi's loss. The court's order, issued on May 13, prevents Sethupathi from voting until further orders, effectively removing one vote from TVK's tally. This development has caused significant turmoil within TVK, as they were preparing for the floor test to prove majority in the Tamil Nadu Assembly. The court's decision, delivered by Justices L. Victoria Gouri and N. Senthil Kumar, has made the floor test outcome uncertain, with TVK now facing a potential loss of their majority by one vote.

title: Mouni Roy: విడాకుల బాటలో మరో బాలీవుడ్ జంట..నాలుగేళ్లకే దాంపత్యంలో కలతలు
subject: Bollywood actress Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar face divorce rumors after unfollowing each other on Instagram four years post-wedding.
summary: Bollywood actress Mouni Roy and her husband Suraj Nambiar are facing intense speculation about their marriage after they unfollowed each other on Instagram. Although their profiles still feature wedding photos and romantic posts from their January 2022 wedding in Goa, the sudden social media move has triggered divorce rumors. Fans are reacting widely, but neither Roy nor Nambiar has issued an official statement. Amid personal turbulence, Roy remains professionally active, starring in the upcoming romantic comedy 'High Jaanee Toh Ishq Hona Hai' directed by David Dhawan and featuring Varun Dhawan, Pooja Hegde, and Mrunal Thakur, set for release soon.

title: రంగుల ఆహారం.. రోగులకు ఆహ్వానం
subject: Unsafe food practices involving artificial colors and unhygienic storage in Bhagatnagar
summary: The article reports on widespread unsafe food practices in Bhagatnagar, where vendors use artificial and potentially harmful colors in food items like chicken snacks, biryanis, and sweets to enhance visual appeal. Despite regulations limiting food coloring to approved additives in specific concentrations, many establishments flout these rules. Unsanitary storage, reuse of old meat, and excessive use of flavor enhancers like MSG contribute to health risks including cancer, liver disease, and neurological issues. Although a food safety team was previously active under the district collector, enforcement has weakened. Recently, new food inspectors have been appointed and are conducting independent checks, collecting samples, and filing cases against violators. Health experts warn that chemicals like phthalates and caramel color are particularly dangerous. While inspections continue, compliance remains low among food handlers.

title: Ghanpur: ఇకపై ఇంటి వద్దకే కళ్యాణ లక్ష్మి చెక్కులు ఎమ్మెల్యే కడియం శ్రీహరి
subject: Telangana MLA distributes marriage subsidies directly to households
summary: Telangana MLA Kadiyam Sreehari distributed marriage subsidies (Kalyana Lakshmi) and chief minister's aid (CMRF) cheques directly to households in Lingala Ghanpur mandal, aiming to eliminate corruption in welfare schemes. The MLA promised to deliver subsidies directly to homes within two months of application, replacing previous system where beneficiaries had to collect cheques from offices. He criticized past governments for selling posts and jobs, stating current government ensures no corruption in welfare distribution.

title: నకిలీ విత్తనాల ముఠా గుట్టురట్టు...100 కిలోల నిషేధిత  బీటీ-3 పత్తి విత్తనాలు సీజ్
subject: Police bust interstate fake seed racket, seize 100 kg of banned BT-3 cotton seeds
summary: Malkajigiri SOFT and Shamirpet police jointly uncovered an interstate fake seed racket targeting farmers. The accused, Dasari Srinivasarao (58) from Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, procured banned BT-3 cotton seeds at low cost from Srinivas Rao of Madanapalle and planned to sell them at high prices to farmers around Hyderabad. Based on specific intelligence, police intercepted him at OMR Exit-7 in Shamirpet, arresting him and seizing 100 kg of the prohibited seeds stored in two gunny bags. The operation highlights ongoing efforts to curb illegal distribution of unauthorized agricultural inputs in Telangana.

title: రక్షకుడే భక్షకుడైతే ఎవరికి చెప్పుకోవాలి
subject: Telangana MLA questions arrest of Home Minister's son in POCSO case
summary: Telangana MLA Dr. Sanjay Kalvakuntla led a protest at Kothaguda Bus Stand in Kurnool district, demanding immediate arrest of Bandi Bhagiratha, son of Union Home Minister Bandi Sanjay, in a POCSO case. The case involves allegations of sexual harassment and attempted suicide by a minor, with the MLA accusing the Chief Minister of aiding the accused. The BJP website was reported down amid the controversy, with speculation about deliberate shutdown.

title: పేద బిడ్డల కోసం గంట ఎక్కువ పనిచేయండి.. సర్కారు టీచర్లకు సీఎం రేవంత్‌‌ రెడ్డి పిలుపు
subject: Telangana CM announces extended teaching hours and school meal upgrades for underprivileged students
summary: Telangana Chief Minister Revanth Reddy has called for teachers to work an additional hour daily to support underprivileged students, emphasizing that education is an investment in future generations. The government plans to increase education spending from 8.22% to 15% of the budget, launch 1,011 crore-funded integrated schools, and provide enhanced midday meals with chicken, fish, and eggs starting next year. The announcement was made during the 'Praga Vriddhi' event in Hyderabad.

title: రైతులకు ఇబ్బంది కలిగించవద్దు.. కాంటా వేసిన వడ్లను వెంటనే మిల్లులకు తరలించాలి
subject: Telangana MLA directs immediate transfer of stored wheat to mills
summary: Telangana MLA Vemula Veeresham, during a review meeting at the Tahsildar office, instructed officials to promptly move wheat stored in procurement centers across multiple mandals to mills, emphasizing the need to prevent farmer inconvenience and ensure adequate gunny bags for transportation. The directive covers Nakirekala, Kattangur, Kethepalli, Narkatpalli, Chityal, and Ramanapeta mandals, where procurement centers are operating.

title: చెర్వుగట్టు ఆలయ అభివృద్ధికి కృషి..శ్రీపార్వతి జడల రామలింగేశ్వర స్వామి ఆలయం పాలకవర్గం ప్రమాణస్వీకారం
subject: Telangana temple development committee sworn in for Cheruvugattu temple
summary: The Sri Parvati Jadal Ramalingeswara Swami Temple's governing body was sworn in on Monday, with MLA Veemula Veeresham announcing a ₹100 crore development plan for the temple complex. The committee aims to complete infrastructure upgrades by next month, with Chief Minister to lay the foundation stone. The event included special prayers and recognition of committee members, including Chairman Varala Ramesh and directors like Mohan Babu and Bathula Oshayya.

title: కేంద్ర, రాష్ట్ర మంత్రివర్గ సమావేశాలు.. ఎందుకు పారదర్శకంగా లేవు?
subject: Transparency of central and state cabinet meetings in India
summary: The article critically examines the opacity of cabinet meetings in India, highlighting that while the RTI Act allows for exemptions in decision-making processes, it mandates transparency post-decision. It notes that some states like Delhi, Maharashtra, and Madhya Pradesh publish detailed meeting outcomes, while others, including Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, do not, raising concerns about democratic accountability.

title: Tokyo: టోక్యోలో తప్పిన విమాన ప్రమాదం.. ల్యాండింగ్ అవుతుండగా ఏం జరిగిందంటే..!
subject: Tokyo airport near-miss during landing due to strong crosswinds
summary: A Korean Air flight operating an Airbus A321neo experienced a critical moment during landing at Tokyo's Narita International Airport when sudden strong crosswinds caused the aircraft to veer off course. Pilots immediately executed a go-around maneuver, circling back to land safely without any injuries or damage. The incident, captured on video and shared widely on social media, has been praised for the pilots' quick decision-making. Weather conditions at Narita were reported to have included severe crosswinds, a known hazard for aircraft during landing procedures.

title: Miryalaguda: మిర్యాలగూడ రైస్ మిల్లులపై అధికారుల పంజా..
subject: Miryalaguda rice mills inspected for grain import violations ahead of monsoon
summary: In response to expected monsoon rains, civil supplies officials in Nalgonda district's Miryalaguda conducted a special inspection of rice mills to prevent unauthorized grain imports. The operation, led by DSPO Venkateshwarlu and Miryalaguda RDRO Ramana Reddy, involved multiple mandals' tahsildars and revenue officials. Authorities warned mill owners that failing to comply with import regulations would result in strict action, emphasizing the need to protect farmers from exploitation during the rainy season.

title: Nani’s The Paradise slams all baseless rumors
subject: Production team of Nani's The Paradise addresses baseless rumors and confirms project's on-track status
summary: The production team of Nani's The Paradise, directed by Srikanth Odela and produced by SLV Cinemas, has issued a statement addressing recent baseless rumors about the film. They clarified that the project has been meticulously planned from inception, with 100+ shooting days completed without any reshoots. The team emphasized adherence to the original creative vision and warned against circulating false information. The film, featuring Nani, Mohan Babu, and Raghav Juyal, is set for a grand worldwide release on August 21, 2026.

title: NEET UG 2026 exam cancelled, re-test to be conducted soon
subject: NEET UG 2026 exam cancellation and re-test announcement
summary: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has cancelled the NEET UG 2026 examination conducted on May 3 due to allegations of irregularities, with the Government of India ordering a CBI inquiry. The NTA announced the re-conduction of the exam on new dates without requiring fresh registration or additional fees, carrying forward existing candidate data and centres. Refunds for paid fees will be processed, and candidates are advised to rely on official channels for updates, avoiding unverified social media reports.

title: Cotton price reaches Rs 10k mark, but farmers fail to reap dividends
subject: Cotton price surge to Rs 10,000 per quintal fails to benefit Telangana farmers who sold earlier at lower rates due to moisture content and market volatility
summary: Cotton prices in Telangana's Adilabad district have risen to Rs 10,000 per quintal, but most farmers missed the benefits as they sold their produce earlier at Rs 7,000 per quintal. The Cotton Corporation of India (CCI) set a minimum support price of Rs 8,110 per quintal with 8% moisture content in October, but farmers were forced to sell at lower rates due to higher moisture content in their produce. Private traders cited international market price hikes for cotton bales, seeds, and oil as reasons for the domestic price surge. Only a small fraction of farmers who stored their cotton are now profiting, while the majority lament volatile markets and inadequate income despite the price spike.

title: ఖానామెట్‌లో భూ కబ్జా!
subject: Illegal land grab of 1,400 sq yd worth ₹50 crore in Khanamet, Hyderabad by alleged criminals with political backing
summary: The article reports an illegal land grab in Khanamet, Hyderabad, where 1,400 square yards of land worth ₹50 crore was seized by alleged criminals linked to political figures. The land, jointly owned by five individuals with valid registration and sale deeds for 15 years, is adjacent to Syed Makbool's property. He, along with armed men, reportedly removed fencing, occupied the site, and has been threatening owners, claiming backing from a "big leader." Victims say police and GHMC officials have ignored complaints, allegedly due to political protection. The incident highlights growing concerns over land encroachment and state complicity in Greater Hyderabad.

title: Nara Rohit: కమర్షియల్ ఫ్యామిలీ ఎంటర్‌టైనర్‌గా.. నారా రోహిత్-నయన్ కొత్త సినిమా షురూ..
subject: Nara Rohit's new commercial family entertainer film begins production
summary: Nara Rohit's new commercial family entertainer film, directed by Chinimilli Manikumar and produced by Bhart Choudary, has commenced shooting at Annapurna Studios. The film features Nayan Sarika as the female lead and includes a star-studded cast. Rohit expressed confidence in the film's appeal, stating it will excite audiences with its concept. The production aims to complete filming swiftly for a release within the same year, with the first schedule starting on June 10.

title: Telangana police invoke stringent POCSO provisions against Bageerath
subject: Telangana police upgrade charges in POCSO case against Union Minister Bandi Sanjay's son with stricter non-bailable provisions
summary: Telangana police have intensified the legal action in the POCSO case against Bandi Sai Bageerath, son of Union Minister of State for Home Bandi Sanjay, by invoking more stringent non-bailable sections of the POCSO Act. The charges have been changed from Section 11 r/w 12, which pertains to sexual harassment of a child with up to three years' imprisonment, to Section 5(1) r/w 6, which mandates a minimum 20-year sentence and applies when the victim suffers serious consequences like physical incapacity or mental illness. The case was registered on May 8 based on a complaint by the minor victim's mother, alleging repeated inappropriate behavior and molestation, including at a New Year party in Moinabad. Additionally, Vamshi Krishna, Bageerath's maternal uncle and a doctor in Karimnagar, has been summoned to appear with Bageerath by 2 pm Wednesday, with a warning of legal action for non-compliance. The investigation is being supervised by DCP Kukatpally Ritiraj to ensure thoroughness.

title: హైడ్రా మూడోకన్ను.. 264 చెరువుల దగ్గర 900 కెమెరాల ఏర్పాటు.. మట్టి, వ్యర్థాలు వేస్తే కేసులు తప్పవు
subject: Hyderabad's implementation of 900 CCTV cameras around 264 lakes for continuous monitoring
summary: Hyderabad Urban Development Authority (HUDA) has initiated a comprehensive surveillance system for the city's lakes, installing 900 CCTV cameras across 264 lakes to monitor and prevent illegal activities such as dumping soil and waste. The system, officially launched on May 12, 2026, enables real-time monitoring from a centralized control room, with immediate alerts and action against violators. The initiative aims to protect the lakes from encroachment and pollution, following previous efforts to restore key water bodies. HUDA Commissioner AV Ranganath emphasized the 24-hour surveillance capability and the use of CCTV footage to identify vehicles involved in illegal dumping.

title: హైదరాబాద్ పబ్లిక్ స్కూల్‌లో ఎస్సీలకు ప్రవేశాలు.. బేగంపేట, రామంతపూర్‌ బ్రాంచీల్లో 53 సీట్ల కేటాయింపు
subject: Telangana government allocates 53 SC student seats at Hyderabad Public Schools
summary: The Telangana government has allocated 53 seats for SC students at Hyderabad Public Schools' Begumpet and Ramnathpur branches, with 34 seats at Begumpet and 19 at Ramnathpur. The government will cover tuition fees ranging from ₹1.5 lakh to ₹3 lakh per student, with selection based on merit by district collectors. The SC Welfare Department will soon issue a notification for the seat allocation.

title: టెక్కీలను వెంటాడుతున్న వర్క్ ఫ్రమ్ హోమ్ భయం.. కలవరంలో IT కంపెనీలు..?
subject: IT professionals' anxiety over remote work policies amid layoffs
summary: IT professionals globally are experiencing heightened anxiety due to widespread layoffs in the tech sector, with many fearing that remote work policies will exacerbate job insecurity. Companies, however, argue that remote work complicates productivity tracking and business continuity, especially after challenges during the pandemic. Despite Prime Minister Modi's suggestion to allow work from home, many IT workers remain skeptical, citing past experiences with silent layoffs and difficulty finding new jobs after losing employment.

title: ధాన్యం కాంటా వేయట్లేదని సొసైటీ ఆఫీసుకు తాళం.. ఆర్మూర్లో రైతుల నిరసన
subject: Farmers protest at Armoor cooperative society office over grain collection delay
summary: Farmers in Ramapur village, part of the Armoor cooperative society in Nizamabad district, protested at the society office on Monday after their paddy grain was not collected for a month. They accused the society of favoring other villages by sending only one or two trucks daily to those areas while neglecting Ramapur. The farmers claimed they had stored their harvested grain in granaries for over a month. Society officials promised to dispatch trucks to address the issue, prompting the farmers to disperse and later submit a memorandum to the Sub Collector, Abhijna Malvia.

title: Karepalli | సింగరేణి ఇంచార్జ్ ఎంపీడీవోగా రవీంద్ర ప్రసాద్..!
subject: Mallare Ravi Prasad appointed as in-charge MPDO for Singareni Mandal following P. Srinivas's promotion
summary: Mallare Ravi Prasad was appointed as the in-charge Mandal Parishad Development Officer (MPDO) for Singareni Mandal following the promotion of previous MPDO P. Srinivas to Deputy Collector in Khammam District. Ravi Prasad, who previously served as an MPDO, took charge of the role on Tuesday and met with staff and local representatives to outline his focus on developmental initiatives and government welfare program implementation. Local officials and representatives presented flower bouquets to Ravi Prasad during the transition. The appointment was formalized through official orders from senior authorities.

title: NEET UG 2026 paper leak: Congress, BRS demand apology from Modi govt
subject: NEET UG 2026 exam cancelled due to paper leak allegations, triggering political backlash and student distress
summary: The National Testing Agency cancelled the NEET (UG) 2026 exam held on May 3 following allegations of a paper leak, with the Centre ordering a CBI inquiry into the irregularities. Congress and BRS leaders condemned the incident, blaming the NDA government for administrative failure and demanding accountability, a high-level probe, and a fresh exam. Both parties called for the Centre to apologise to students and parents. Students and parents expressed anguish over the emotional and financial toll of re-preparing, with some describing the cancellation as a devastating setback. Political criticism centered on the government's inability to secure a critical national exam despite claims of efficiency.

title: Hanuman Miracle Village: ఆంజనేయుడి మహిమ... పాము కరిచిన 48 గంటల్లోగా...
subject: Hanuman Miracle Village's coexistence with snakes and snakebite healing ritual
summary: In Nagena Halli village, Karnataka, residents live harmoniously with hundreds of snakes without fear. Snakebites are treated by drinking Hanuman's holy water from the Anjaneya temple and observing a 48-hour vigil without leaving the village boundaries. The article explains this unique tradition, attributing it to spiritual practices and a historical legend of a saint's blessing. Modern medicine finds this phenomenon challenging, with locals claiming the ritual neutralizes venom. The article emphasizes the village's deep faith and the condition that the victim must not cross village limits during the 48-hour period.

title: అంజన్నకు నీరాజనం.. కొండగట్టు భక్తజనసంద్రం
subject: Kondagattu temple hosts Hanuman Jayanti celebrations with massive devotee turnout
summary: The Kondagattu Anjaneya Swamy temple in Telangana witnessed a massive influx of over 1.5 lakh devotees from across the state during the three-day Hanuman Jayanti festival. The celebrations peaked on Tuesday with the ceremonial offering of sacred cloths presented officially from the Bhadrachalam Sri Sita Ramaswamy temple, while chants of 'Jai Hanuman' echoed throughout the hill shrine. Devotees participated in fervent prayers and darshan, transforming the site into a sea of devotion.

title: 10th పాసైన వారికి గుడ్ న్యూస్.. CSIRలో  మల్టీటాస్కింగ్ స్టాఫ్, డ్రైవర్  పోస్టులు..
subject: CSIR-NEIST announces recruitment for multi-tasking staff and driver positions
summary: CSIR-NEIST has announced recruitment for 10 positions including 9 multi-tasking staff (MTS) and 1 driver (non-technical), requiring matriculation or equivalent qualification, with a maximum age limit of 27 years. Applications are open from May 5 to June 4, with selection based on written test and skill test. The institute's website www.neist.res.in provides further details.

title: బండి భగీరథ్ పై పోక్సో కేసు నీరు గార్చేందుకు బీజేపీ, కాంగ్రెస్ కుమ్మక్కు... బీఆర్ఎస్ ఆధ్వర్యంలో నిరసన
subject: Telangana opposition parties protest against BJP and Congress for allegedly shielding Bandi Bhagirath in POCSO case
summary: BRS-led protests in Telangana, including burning of Bandi Sanjay's photo and large rallies, demand the removal of Union Minister Bandi Sanjay from his post and the arrest of his son Bhagirath in a POCSO case. Opposition leaders accuse BJP and Congress of colluding to protect Bhagirath, with BRS leaders stating that the case is being 'watered down' and that justice for the minor victim is being denied. The protests, held in multiple locations including Ramnagar and Chilkalgangar, highlight allegations of political interference in the judicial process, with BRS threatening further large-scale protests if action is not taken.

title: రైల్వే స్టేషన్లలో భద్రతను కట్టుదిట్టం చేయాలి..అధికారులకు జీఎం శ్రీవాస్తవ ఆదేశం
subject: South Central Railway GM directs enhanced security at railway stations
summary: South Central Railway General Manager Sanjay Kumar Srivastava ordered enhanced security measures at railway stations, including night-time inspections and improved safety protocols for level crossings and electrical systems. The directive followed a review meeting held at Rail Nidhi in Secunderabad, attended by Additional GM Satyaprasad and senior department heads, focusing on uninterrupted and safe train operations.

title: 2030 దాటినా మోదీ హవానే!..నాలుగోసారి ప్రధాని పీఠంపై కన్ను..బ్లూమ్‌‌‌‌బెర్గ్ విశ్లేషణలో ఆసక్తికర అంశాలు
subject: Narendra Modi's potential fourth term as Prime Minister and his political strategy beyond 2030
summary: Bloomberg's analysis indicates that Prime Minister Narendra Modi is positioning for a fourth term, extending his rule beyond 2030. The analysis points to BJP's strategic success in consolidating Hindu voter blocs, particularly after their historic victory in West Bengal assembly elections, which weakened opposition parties. Despite losing a majority in Rajya Sabha, Modi's focus on economic reforms and national security has strengthened his political standing. The report predicts BJP will be the favorite in the 2029 national elections, with Modi potentially becoming India's longest-serving Prime Minister.

title: CM Vijay | టీవీకే కార్యకర్తలకు సీఎం విజయ్ స్ట్రాంగ్ వార్నింగ్.. బ్యాన‌ర్లు, ఫ్లెక్సీలు పెడితే కఠిన చర్యలు తప్పవు!
subject: TVK party issues strict warning to cadres against erecting banners and flexes during public events
summary: The TVK party, led by Chief Minister Vijay, has issued a strict directive to its cadres prohibiting the erection of banners, posters, and flexes during public events, family celebrations, or any activity causing traffic disruption. The directive emphasizes prioritizing public welfare over party activities, with warnings of strict action against violators. The party cited its founding principle of focusing on public welfare and maintaining public trust as the reason for the warning.

title: ఖమ్మంలో లారీలు ఢీ: ఇద్దరు సజీవదహనం
subject: Two truck drivers die in fiery collision in Khammam district
summary: In Khammam district, Telangana, two trucks collided head-on near Makal Tanda in Tirumalayapalem mandal, resulting in a fire that caused both drivers to die in a live burn. Firefighters and police arrived at the scene to put out the fire and recover the bodies. Police suspect excessive speed as the cause and have filed a case for investigation. The exact details are still being investigated.

title: Kadiri: కదిరి తహశీల్దార్‌కు బాధితుల ఫిర్యాదు.. విచారణలో షాకింగ్ నిజాలు
subject: Fake land ownership certificates distributed in Kadiri rural mandal
summary: During a land distribution program under the previous YCP government, VCP leaders allegedly distributed fake land ownership certificates to ten farmers in Nallagutta and Chigurumani villages of Mutyalacheruvu Panchayat. Farmers who later sought bank loans discovered the documents were counterfeit. The Tahsildar confirmed the fraud, and victims are demanding justice. VCP leaders face allegations of involvement in large-scale land fraud during the previous government's tenure, with potential for widespread exposure of fake certificates across the mandal.

title: Karimnagar: మహిళలకు గుడ్ న్యూస్.. కరీంనగర్ రూరల్‌లో నూతన భవనం ప్రారంభం!
subject: Inauguration of a new women's association building in Bahadurkhapet, Karimnagar Rural
summary: A new women's association building in Bahadurkhapet, Karimnagar Rural, built at a cost of ₹10 lakh using funds from the National Employment Guarantee Scheme, was inaugurated by SUDA Chairman Komatireddy Narender Reddy. He expressed happiness over the launch and urged effective utilization of the facility, highlighting the state government's focus on women's empowerment through various schemes. Sarpanch Gurram Sandhya Tirupathi Reddy was commended for completing the building swiftly. The event saw participation from local officials including MPO Jagannadh Reddy, DE Janardhan, AE Samaiah, and several sarpanchs and women's association members.

title: Senior Maoist leader Pasunuri Narahari surrenders
subject: Senior Maoist leader Pasunuri Narahari surrenders to Telangana Police after decades underground
summary: Senior Maoist leader Pasunuri Narahari alias Santosh, who had been underground for nearly three decades and carried a Rs 20 lakh reward, surrendered to Telangana Police along with his wife. Narahari, a native of Kazipet mandal in Hanamkonda district, joined the Maoist movement in his teenage years and held key roles in the East Regional Bureau. His surrender follows intensified security operations in the Saranda Forest targeting senior Maoist leaders like Misir Besra. The police confirmed he was serving in a technical role in Jharkhand at the time of his surrender.

title: పోక్సో కేసు.. బండి భగీరథ్‌కు పోలీసుల నోటీసులు
subject: Telangana police issue notice to Bandi Bhagirath in POCSO case
summary: Telangana police have issued a notice to Bandi Bhagirath, son of Union Minister Bandi Sanjay, in connection with a POCSO case. The notice, issued by Pat Bhashirabad Police, requires him to appear for questioning at the police station on Wednesday afternoon. The case was registered based on a complaint by a minor (17) and her mother, alleging that Bhagirath was harassing the minor. Bhagirath has also filed a petition in the High Court seeking to quash the case, with a hearing scheduled for June 14th. The case was registered under POCSO Act sections 11, 12, and BNSS sections 74, 75. Bhagirath later filed a complaint with Karimnagar Town Police alleging that the minor and her parents were threatening him for money, leading to a counter-case being filed against them.

title: ఇందిరమ్మ ఇళ్లపై గుడ్ న్యూస్: జూన్ 2 నుంచి రెండో విడత ప్రారంభం
subject: Telangana government to launch second phase of Indiramma housing scheme on June 2
summary: The Telangana government, led by Chief Minister Revanth Reddy, will launch the second phase of the Indiramma housing scheme on June 2 in Adilabad district, marking the state's formation day. Minister Ponguleti Srinivas Reddy announced the decision during a review meeting with public representatives and officials from Rangareddy and Hyderabad districts. The new phase emphasizes constructing homes within 5–8 km of beneficiaries' current residences to protect livelihoods, reversing past policies that placed homes too far from urban centers. Land identification will use assembly constituencies as units. A cabinet meeting on May 21 will finalize guidelines. Housing site approvals for Hyderabad are expected by month-end, and unauthorized occupation of government land will not be tolerated. The first phase is now stabilizing.

title: లిక్కర్ షాపులపై సిఎం విజయ్ సంచలన నిర్ణయం..
subject: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay orders closure of liquor shops within 500 meters of educational institutions, places of worship, and bus stands
summary: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay has issued an order mandating the closure of all liquor shops located within a 500-meter radius of educational institutions, places of worship, and bus stands across the state. The order, issued on Tuesday, provides a two-week window for implementation and is expected to result in the closure of approximately 717 liquor shops statewide. The government emphasized that the decision was made to avoid inconvenience to the public, particularly in areas near sensitive locations where alcohol sales could cause disruption or conflict.

title: Tanker carrying chemical catches fire in Sangareddy
subject: Chemical tanker fire on NH65 near Madgi
summary: On May 12, 2026, a chemical tanker belonging to Goodrich Chemicals caught fire on National Highway 65 near Madgi in Sangareddy district, India. The driver and cleaner safely evacuated the vehicle, and four fire engines were deployed to extinguish the flames. The Sangareddy district fire officer stated the incident occurred under Zaheerabad fire station limits at 5 AM, with the cause still under investigation.

title: నిరుద్యోగం పైపైకి.. యువతలో నిరుద్యోగిత రేటు 15 శాతానికి చేరిక
subject: Youth unemployment rate in India rises to 15 percent
summary: India's youth unemployment rate has climbed to 15%, marking the highest level in the past four quarters, according to the Periodic Labour Force Survey (PLFS) released by the Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI). Unemployment among youth aged 15-29 increased across gender lines, with urban unemployment slightly declining to 6.6% while rural unemployment rose marginally to 4.3%. The data covers the January-March 2026 quarter, showing worsening job market conditions for young people despite earlier government promises of job creation.

title: Aadi’s Next With Shambhala Makers, Haunting Thriller
subject: Aadi Saikumar collaborates with Shambhala's producers for a new horror film directed by Brunda Ravindar
summary: Aadi Saikumar, currently basking in the success of his film Shambhala, is set to collaborate once again with the same production team for a new horror venture. The project, produced by Ugandhar Muni, Mahidhar Reddy, and Rajasekhar Annabimoju under Shining Pictures, marks the directorial debut of Brunda Ravindar. The announcement poster features Aadi partially obscured under dried foliage and blossoms, with blood trickling from his forehead, evoking a mix of beauty and dread. The film aims to deliver a fresh theatrical experience through rooted storytelling, nerve-racking tension, and emotionally charged conflicts. Music director Sricharan Pakala is experimenting with unconventional sound structures and eerie acoustic detailing to create an immersive horror environment. Further cast and crew details remain pending.

title: Hyderabad: ఇలా తయారయ్యారేంట్రా.. రూ.700 కోసం ఇంత దారుణమా.. కిరాతకులు ఏం చేశారో తెలుసా..?
subject: Hyderabad AC technician murdered over ₹700 cannabis dispute
summary: In Hyderabad's Attapur area, AC technician Muhammad Hussain (alias Wasim) was murdered after a dispute over ₹700 for cannabis. Police arrested three of ten suspects within three days, using CCTV footage and witness statements. Hussain was attacked near Khushi Function Hall, beaten severely, and left in a blood pool before being taken to Osmania Hospital where he died. Police linked the case to cannabis addiction and petty disputes driving youth toward crime, with seven suspects still at large.

title: BJP slams YSRCP over remarks against Modi
subject: BJP Andhra Pradesh condemns YSRCP leader's alleged remarks against Prime Minister Modi
summary: The BJP Andhra Pradesh unit strongly condemned alleged derogatory remarks made by former minister Perni Venkataramaiah (Nani) against Prime Minister Narendra Modi, accusing the YSRCP of engaging in irresponsible and insulting politics. State spokesperson Sadineni Yamini Sarma defended Modi's integrity, alleging misuse of public funds by the previous YSRCP government. SC Morcha president Panatala Suresh highlighted Modi's focus on economic discipline and national development, criticizing YSRCP for mockery instead of policy debate, and demanded an unconditional apology from YSRCP president Y.S. Jagan Mohan Reddy. State chief spokesperson Valluru Jayaprakash Narayana asserted that personal attacks reflect political frustration and called for constructive opposition discourse.

title: PM Modi Dedicates ₹1,535 Crore Railway Projects to Boost Telangana Connectivity
subject: Prime Minister Narendra Modi dedicates ₹1,535 crore railway projects to enhance Telangana's connectivity and logistics efficiency.
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi dedicated railway projects valued at ₹1,535 crores in Telangana on May 10, 2026, from Hyderabad. The projects include the ₹1,243 crore upgrade of the Kazipet-Vijayawada corridor (a critical North-South rail link) and the ₹292 crore Kazipet Rail Under Rail Bypass. These upgrades aim to modernize rail infrastructure, reduce congestion at Kazipet junction, and improve freight and passenger movement. The corridor upgrades involve multi-tracking and electrification to support higher train frequencies, while the bypass will streamline train operations across three major directions: Secunderabad, Balharshah, and Vijayawada. The developments align with the government’s vision of enhancing regional connectivity and accelerating industrial growth through efficient transportation networks.

title: Mango pulp stocks better than last year, Collector assures farmers
subject: District Collector assures mango farmers that pulp stocks are better than last year, with over 80% sold
summary: District Collector Sumit Kumar held a review meeting on May 12, 2026, to address mango farmers' concerns about pulp stocks. He stated that over 80% of the pulp has already been sold, emphasizing that the situation is better than last year and there is no cause for panic. Pulp owners assured the administration that processing will begin on time and support farmers. Additionally, 6.5 crore mango covers were distributed this year, and the coloured Totapuri variety is expected to fetch higher prices.

title: బండి భగీరథ్‌ను అరెస్టు చేయాలి
subject: BRS activists and women's groups demand immediate arrest of Bandi Bhagirath in sexual harassment case
summary: BRS cadres and women's organizations have demanded the immediate arrest of Bandi Bhagirath, son of Union Minister Bandi Sanjay, accused of sexually harassing a minor girl. Protests erupted across Bhadradri Kothagudem district following a call by former MLA Rega Kantharao, with demonstrators criticizing police inaction and questioning unequal justice. Protesters warned of large-scale agitation and besieging Bandi's residence if justice is not delivered. They also demanded Bandi Sanjay resign on moral grounds. Women's leaders criticized the BJP-led central government for rising sexual crimes against women and children, calling for strict enforcement of women's protection laws.

title: Atmakur: నల్లమలలో విజయనగర కాలం నాటి విశేషాలు
subject: Discovery of 1553 Vijayanagara-era stone inscription at Ahobilam temple
summary: The Archaeological Survey of India has uncovered a 1553 stone inscription at the Upper Ahobilam Temple in Atmakur, Telangana, which provides historical details about a donation of 12 gold varahas for daily rituals of Lord Narasimha. The inscription, dated to July 2, 1553 (Saturday), during the reign of Vijayanagara king Sadashivaraya, mentions Kurukunda village as an agraharam (temple village) and references the nearby temples of Varadaraja Swami and Lingamayya. The inscription, carved in Kannada script on a stone wall near the main gate, has remained intact for 471 years, with similar inscriptions found in the region dating back 700 years. Archaeologists believe further research could reveal historical details from hundreds of thousands of years.

title: వైభవంగా హనుమాన్‌ జయంతి
subject: Hanuman Jayanti celebrations at ancient Anjaneya Swami temple in Devrayanallu
summary: The 250-year-old Anjaneya Swami temple in Devrayanallu, a historically significant spiritual site, hosted grand Hanuman Jayanti celebrations on Tuesday. The event featured panchamrita abhishekam, vadama pujas, and ashtottara pujas in the morning, followed by special archanas, mahaharatas, and annadanam programs in the afternoon. Local youth groups and former officials participated actively, with thousands of devotees attending the ceremonies. The temple is believed to bring auspicious marriage prospects for unmarried women who worship here regularly.
